content:
MODULE: cosmos.interfaces.messaging.slack_adapter
FILE: cosmos/interfaces/messaging/slack_adapter.py (272 lines)
CATEGORY: interfaces

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Slack Adapter
------------------------
Connects cosmos to Slack via slack-bolt.

Usage:
    export SLACK_BOT_TOKEN=xoxb-your-token
    export SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET=your-signing-secret

    from Cosmos.interfaces.messaging.slack_adapter import SlackAdapter

    adapter = SlackAdapter()
    adap

CLASSES:
- SlackAdapter(MessagingProvider): Slack messaging adapter for cosmos.

Provides:
- Two-way messaging with Slack us
  Methods: async def connect(self)
  Methods: async def disconnect(self)
  Methods: async def send_message(self, message: OutgoingMessage)
  Methods: async def add_reaction(self, channel: str, timestamp: str, emoji: str='brain')

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- async def run_standalone()
